---
title: Ville du Morbihan
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557472/etel_20230205_cj73fq.png
description: Le jardin de la maison familiale, Morbihan
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/02/05
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557472/etel_20230205_cj73fq.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
